lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Ahoy there, sailor! Can't stop to talk right now, I'm afraid. You'll need to come back later.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Ahoy there, sailor, and welcome to the Storm Tempor!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Welcome? This place doesn't look very welcoming to me.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: What do you mean? We've got the fresh sea breeze, the spray of the ocean water, a supply of the finest rum around, and one of the fiercest storms in Gielinor to contend with.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: What's not to love?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, it's contending with that storm that worries me.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Aye, it's true that the storm's bested many a sailor around these parts. Still, that's what makes things so exciting! We Barracudas live for the rush, and we trust that our skills will save us from a trip to the locker.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But why? Could you not just take the safer route around the storm?

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Well, you see, there's value in sailors with skills like ours. Most common folk would think like you and avoid the storm, but that takes time, and as them merchants say, 'time is money.'

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: But that's where we come in! Those merchant folk sail up to the south end of the storm, drop off their shipments to one of our boats down there and we make sure it gets up to the Pandemonium!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. That does make sense, but what's in it for you guys?

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Why, the thrill of the sport! Sailing isn't just about going places, it's about mastery of the boat, the pull of the sails, the feeling of the helm in your hand and the taste of rum in your mouth!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sailing as a sport? How does that work? What are the rules?

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Fancy getting involved, do you? Well, we Barracudas have trials set up all across the sea where you can test your mettle against the clock. I'm in charge of this here trial, the Tempor Tantrum.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: The objective of this trial is to collect rum shipments and bring them here. To do so, work your way around Tempoross Cove, towards our boat to the south.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: While you're out there, keep an eye out for any lost supplies. You'll need to collect all of them to complete the trial.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Sailing over rapids will give you a burst of speed! Try to go over as many as you can. The more rapids you go through in quick succession, the faster you'll go!

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: The storm isn't going to make it easy for you. Those storm clouds are a nasty piece of work and they'll slow your boat down if they hit you.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Keep a close eye on them. If they are growing in size, that means they are about to strike. However, don't let your guard down once they do, as they always strike twice!

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: As you make your way around, don't forget your objective. You need to keep picking up lost supplies on route to our southern boat.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Once you reach the boat, collect a shipment of rum from it and then make your way back here.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Make sure you come back the opposite side of Tempoross Cove to the way you went, otherwise you're going to end up missing some lost supplies.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: If you can deliver all the rum shipments and collect all the lost supplies in the time given, you'll be awarded a Barracuda rank!

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Each trial has three ranks: Swordfish, Shark or Marlin. Each rank is harder than the last.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: For this trial, you'll be asked to fetch additional rum shipments and collect even more lost supplies as the rank increases.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: You can't attempt the next rank until you beat the one before it. You can also try unranked if you'd like to warm up beforehand.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: That said, with your Sailing experience I'd suggest sailing elsewhere for now and coming back when you've learned a thing or two.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the advice, I'll bear that in mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Do you have any tips or tricks for me?

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Sure do, sailor!

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: First up, you're going to need a boat with at least an oak mast built in order to withstand the storm. Your boat's as good as a goner without that.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Second, your boat will also need to have at least an iron helm to withstand the rapids, but provided you can withstand them, they'll provide a burst of speed to your boat.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Third, avoid them lightning clouds! Even with a strong mast they'll still slow you down.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Fourth, keep your sails trimmed to gain even more speed. This aint no shipwreck salvaging. Go fast or go home!

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Finally, watch out for those rocks. Hitting them will kill all of your boats momentum immediately.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the advice. I'll bear that in mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to attempt the Tempor Tantrum.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: You should make sure your helm is manned before starting the trial.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: For this Barracuda Trial you are not allowed to bring any crewmates.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you help me transfer my crew away?

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Yes, I suppose so.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll come back another time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about the Tempor Tantrum?

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Well, you see, there's value in sailors with skills like ours. Most common folk would avoid the storm, but that takes time, and as them merchants say, 'time is money.'

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: That's where we come in! Those merchant folk sail up to the south end of the storm, drop off their shipments to one of our boats down there and we make sure it gets up to the Pandemonium!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And what do I need to do during the trial?

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: The objective of this trial is to collect rum shipments and bring them here. To do so, work your way around Tempoross Cove, towards our boat to the south.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: The name's Ralph, Rum-Dashed Ralph. I'm a trial master for the Barracudas and I've been tasked with overseeing our operation over here by Storm Tempor.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are there any benefits to being a trial master?

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Plenty! Nothing brings a smile to my face quite like seeing a young budding sailor work at their skills and prove themselves capable of overcoming the storm.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Not to mention, the free rum recovered while doing the trial doesn't go amiss either!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about those that fail?

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: I wish them a safe journey to the locker.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are the Barracudas?

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: We're only the fastest, most competent, most skilled and good looking sailors to sail the seas! Our motto is 'Anyone from anywhere as long as they can sail.'

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Our goal is to work together and teach anyone willing the skills required to be a master sailor capable of overcoming anything.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I become a Barracuda?

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Haha! That's the spirit! Of course you can, but only once you prove yourself in our trials. There's a bunch of trial masters like me scattered across the seas. Best our trials and earn your spot in our ranks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd best be off.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Ahoy there, sailor, and welcome to the Storm Tempor!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any tips or tricks for me?

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Sure do, sailor!

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: First up, you're going to need a boat with at least an oak mast built in order to withstand the storm. Your boat's as good as a goner without that.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Second, your boat will also need to have at least an iron helm to withstand the rapids, but provided you can withstand them, they'll provide a burst of speed to your boat.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Third, avoid them lightning clouds! Even with a strong mast they'll still slow you down.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Fourth, keep your sails trimmed to gain even more speed. This aint no shipwreck salvaging. Go fast or go home!

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Finally, watch out for those rocks. Hitting them will kill all of your boats momentum immediately.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the advice. I'll bear that in mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do I have any rewards to claim?

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Sorry, but I don't have anything for you at the moment.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: That's everything I have for you. Good luck in future trials!

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: Woah, look at you go out there! You really surprised me with your mastery! A shark rank well earned.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! I wasn't sure I was going to make it in time.

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: It's not often I see a sailor come through here with such promise. Here, I'll treat you to a drink on me. My speciality, the whirlpool surprise!

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: It's made from rum, fresh bananas, more rum, some sugar cane, and here's the surprise... even more rum!

lines.speaker: Rum-dashed Ralph
lines.text: If you fancy some more, have a word with Steve Beanie over at the Pandemonium. I'll send word to let you have access to his premium selection, for a price of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! Do I have any more rewards to claim?
